sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي بَعْضُ الرِّجَالِ الثَّوْبَ فِي المَنَاسَبَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Neki muškarci nose tobe na proslavama.
sentences.translationEn: Some men wear the thobe on occasions.

sentences.arabic: اللَّوْنُ الأَبْيَضُ شَائِعٌ فِي دَوْلِ الخَلِيجِ.
sentences.translation: Bijela boja je uobičajena u državama Zaljeva.
sentences.translationEn: White color is common in Gulf countries.

sentences.arabic: تَرْتَدِي المَرْأَةُ العَبَاءَةَ فِي الأَمَاكِنِ العَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Žena nosi abayu na javnim mjestima.
sentences.translationEn: The woman wears the abaya in public places.

sentences.arabic: المَلَابِسُ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةُ جُزْءٌ مِنَ الهُوِيَّةِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Tradicionalna odjeća je dio kulturnog identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: Traditional clothing is part of cultural identity.
